triples.subject: electric vehicle industry
triples.sentence: Over the past few years, the electric vehicle industry has experienced massive increases in government subsidies, consumer sentiment, and popularity.

triples.subject: federal government
triples.sentence: the federal government boosts demand for electric vehicles by offering a US$7,500 tax credit on electric vehicle purchases

triples.subject: Biden administration
triples.object: US$400 billion investment into clean energy
triples.sentence: These large subsidies are expected to increase under the Biden administration, which recently promised a US$400 billion investment into clean energy.

triples.subject: Biden’s plan
triples.object: building at least 500,000 charging stations by 2030
triples.sentence: Part of Biden’s plan includes the EV industry and a promise to build at least 500,000 charging stations by 2030 from the 29,000 stations that exist today.

triples.subject: Deloitte survey
triples.sentence: In a survey of 1,500 individuals by Deloitte, 68 percent of respondents were very concerned about their carbon footprint.

triples.subject: Tesla
triples.sentence: Some Teslas have traveled over 400,000 miles with little to no issues in regard to their performance.

triples.subject: Workhorse
triples.sentence: Workhorse has reached gains as high as 1,000 percent at certain points in the year.
